title: Senior Financial Analyst - Juspay South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Juspay South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Juspay South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Juspay South Asia Partners:
Juspay South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
